title: Hanh Trinh Phat Trien Cua Viettel
subtitle: Tu mot don vi quan doi nho den tap doan toan cau

events.title: Thanh lap
events.copy: Cong ty Phat trien Vien thong Quan doi duoc thanh lap ngay 15/6/1989, bat dau kinh doanh vien thong voi von dieu le chi 300 trieu dong.

events.title: Khoi dau Mobile
events.copy: Trien khai he thong tram goc dau tien, chinh thuc buoc vao linh vuc vien thong di dong tai Viet Nam.

events.title: Thanh lap Viettel Telecom
events.copy: Thanh lap Cong ty Vien thong Viettel (Viettel Telecom), mo rong quy mo kinh doanh tren toan quoc.

events.title: Thu nghiem 3G
events.copy: Viettel la nha mang dau tien tai Viet Nam thu nghiem thanh cong cong nghe 3G, dan dat xu huong truyen thong di dong the he moi.

events.title: Viettel Global niem yet
events.copy: Cong ty con Viettel Global (nay la Viettel Solutions) niem yet tren So Giao dich Chung khoan TP.HCM (HOSE).
